content: Use `bun run check` as the full validation gate: TypeScript lint (`bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck`), dashboard build, then `bun test`. For narrower loops use `bun test`; bwrap/Pi agent spawning and delegation still require manual verification per tests/README.md.

name: Spawn/worktree coverage uses pure spawn builders plus real temp git repos
description: To cover multi-agent spawn behavior without a Pi+bwrap runtime, extract pure argument builders from spawn.ts and test their Pi RPC/bwrap command output directly. Cover worktree lifecycle with temporary real git repos and fake active agents, and cover sendToAgent with fake stdin streams plus manual _nextTurn resolution for queueing semantics.
